title: Thriller Bark’s Zombies Awaken
main_description: The crew explores the haunted island as Moria’s zombie army and Hogback’s experiments are revealed. The chapter mainly follows Whitebeard, Perona, Brook, Moria, keeping the focus on the Thriller Bark storyline.
